reason_not_scored: Video shows Medical Simulations equipment and trainer setup/overview with no actual task performance. Frames display the FLS trainer box from multiple angles, camera/light equipment being positioned, and monitor displays showing the internal trainer surface. No trainee is performing a timed FLS task (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture). This is equipment demonstration/setup footage, not a scorable performance.
frames_observed: All frames (1-20) show stationary trainer setup, equipment positioning, and monitor displays. No surgical instruments in use on task materials. No timing clock visible. No task-specific actions being performed.
conclusion: This video cannot be scored using FLS rubrics because no trainee performance of a defined FLS task is present. Return to sender for actual task performance recording.
